query: History of the artificialintelligenceact.eu national implementation plans tracker: how many EU member states classified as Clear (designated both market surveillance and notifying authorities) over time in late 2025 and 2026. What is the trend/rate of member states moving to Clear status?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of what I found:

## Key Finding: A step-function jump from 3 to 9

The artificialintelligenceact.eu National Implementation Plans tracker labels an EU Member State **"Clear"** when it has designated **both** a market surveillance authority and a notifying authority (per AI Act Article 70).

**The "Clear" count did not rise gradually.** Across every Wayback Machine snapshot from **August 2025 through mid-June 2026**, the tracker's headline count was **frozen at 3** — because the page's stated "Last update" date was stuck at **19 May 2025** the entire time. Then, in a single content refresh dated **17 June 2026**, the count jumped to **9**.

### Trajectory
| Period | Clear | Partial | Unclear |
|---|---|---|---|
| Aug 2025 – early/mid June 2026 (frozen, "Last update: 19 May 2025") | **3** | 10 | 14 |
| From 17 June 2026 refresh onward | **9** | 12 | 6 |

- **The 9 Clear states (17 Jun 2026):** Cyprus, Denmark, Finland, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Lithuania, Malta, Slovenia.
- **Original 3:** Denmark, Hungary, Malta. **Net +6** added in the June 2026 update.

### Trend/rate interpretation (facts, not forecast)
- As a headline metric, the Clear count behaves as a **step function**, not a smooth curve — one discrete jump of **+6** recorded on 17 June 2026 after ~13 months frozen at 3.
- The direction is strongly positive: Clear tripled (3→9), Unclear collapsed (14→6).
- **Important caveat:** The count only updates when the editors (Future of Life Institute) do a comprehensive review, so it does **not** give a reliable month-by-month rate of states moving to Clear. The real-world designations accumulated across late 2025/early 2026 but were captured on the page in one batch in June 2026. Any per-month rate derived from the page's headline figures would reflect editorial cadence, not actual designation timing.

sources.title: Overview of all AI Act National Implementation Plans
sources.snippet: As of the date this post was last updated, 9 Member States have designated both market surveillance and notifying authorities ('clear'). ... 12 Member States ... 'partial clarity', whereas 6 Member States have yet to designate ... ('unclear'). Last update: 17 June 2026.

sources.title: National Implementation Plans (archived 2 Aug 2025)
sources.snippet: three Member States have designated both notifying and market surveillance authorities ('clear'). ... ten ... 'partial clarity', whereas 14 ... yet to designate. Last update: 19 May 2025.

sources.snippet: three Member States have designated both notifying and market surveillance authorities ('clear'). Last update 19 May 2025.

sources.snippet: three Member States ... 'clear'; ten 'partial clarity'; 14 yet to designate. Last update 19 May 2025 (cached).

sources.title: National Implementation Plans (archived 3 Jul 2026, showing 9)
sources.snippet: 9 Member States have designated both market surveillance and notifying authorities ('clear'): Cyprus, Denmark, Finland, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Lithuania, Malta, Slovenia. Last update 17 June 2026.

sources.title: Article 70: Designation of national competent authorities and a single point of contact
sources.snippet: Each Member State must appoint at least one notifying authority and one market surveillance authority.
